text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's finally here, Trainer. The autumn Tenno
Sho—my race against Oguri...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm not here to jog. My goal is first place. I fully
intend to win!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If I don't, then I can't call myself the greatest
villain ever.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We've done all sorts of training to reach our goal.
All that's left is...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I haven't practiced my villain voice at all. How are
the fans going to get excited now?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Heheheh, you naughty child. ♪ How dare you
defy me? Kneel before your master!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Beg for my forgiveness, and you might yet receive
it... ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: R-right? I'm actually enjoying myself quite a bit...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But I don't think I should be. I'll tone it down a
smidge if I win!
